summary: A confusing matrix recording that mixes soundboard and audience sources; the Cold Rain & Snow performance shines, but uneven audio quality drags the overall experience.
review: The show contains a noteworthy rendition of Cold Rain & Snow (Jerry’s solo gets praise) and a clean Good Lovin' segment, but the tape is a patchwork of SBD and AUD material that jumps between two different nights, leaving the first five tracks muddy and the later sections only marginally better. Reviewers are split – some enjoy the musical moments while many criticize the chaotic source handling and sub‑par sound.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is average with a few standout performances; recording quality is inconsistent (matrix, fair overall). The mix of positive and negative reviewer comments leads to a middle‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tracks are assembled from both soundboard (SBD) and audience (AUD) sources, causing abrupt changes in fidelity; first five tracks are muddy, later electric sections are clearer but still uneven.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The track order is jumbled – the middle of the show appears first, then the opening set from a different night, followed by later material. This creates a confusing flow that obscures the original set structure.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Nice solo on Cold Rain & Snow noted.
